race.comment: JUST GLAMOUROUS (14) has gone to a new level this time in and comes back in trip with the weight drop. Gritty performance from the outside draw with a narrow third when out to the 1600m at this track. Hard fit fifth-up and gets her chance. Note the blinkers are on for a yard that like to use there for target races. Looks her spot. GLORIOUS MOMENTS (1) is a good type desperate to draw a low gate. Covered plenty of ground in the run for a courageous sixth over this track and trip last start. Strips fitter and can play a leading role. SUPERMASSIVE (9) is heading in the right direction but must overcome a horror gate. Tim Clark sticks and place best. INVADER ZIM (21) is racing as well as he ever has and lands in another race that he can get into the mix of.
